_note: A2A Agent Card for the AAC boundary seal reference implementation. Generated via a2a-sdk 1.1.1 (a2a-sdk PyPI). Extended with the AAC capsule extension declaration.
name: AAC Boundary Seal Agent
description: Reference agent for the A2A ↔ AAC boundary seal (draft-mih-scitt-agent-action-capsule-02). Every A2A task input/output is sealed as a SCITT Signed Statement and anchored on the capsule transparency log.

skills.name: Boundary Seal
skills.description: Seals A2A task input and output as an AAC capsule. Every response includes a capsule extension carrying capsule_id and the anchor URL for independent SCITT verification.

extensions.description: Each SendMessage response task artifact carries a capsule extension with capsule_id and anchor URL. The capsule_id is the content-address (SHA-256 of JCS(capsule body)) per -02 §4.2.
